person.name: Mathilde de Bourgogne
person.alternateName: Mahaut OF BURGUNDY COUNTESS OF GRIGNON

sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy -  MATHILDE de Bourgogne, daughter of HUGUES III Duke of Burgundy & his second wife Béatrix Dauphine de Viennois ([1190]-26 Mar before 1242).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Bourgogne於1192年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布格時，她的父親Hugues III de Bourgogne44歲，母親Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois30歲。她於大約1215年與Amadeus IV Count of Savoy在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年3月26日在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內哈帕格享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Bourgogne于1192年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布格时，她的父亲Hugues III de Bourgogne44岁，母亲Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois30岁。她于大约1215年与Amadeus IV Count of Savoy在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年3月26日在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內哈帕格享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Bourgogne was born in 1192, in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Hugues III de Bourgogne, was 44 and her mother, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, was 30. She married Amadeus IV Count of Savoy about 1215, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 26 March 1242, in Champagne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Bourgogne est née en 1192, à Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Hugues III de Bourgogne, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Amadeus IV Count of Savoy environ 1215, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1242, à Champagne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Bourgogne 1192 in Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues III de Bourgogne 44 und ihre Mutter Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois 30. Sie hat um 1215 in Europa Amadeus IV Count of Savoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. März 1242 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Champagne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Bourgogne è nata il nel 1192 nel Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Hugues III de Bourgogne, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Amadeus IV Count of Savoy circa 1215, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 26 marzo 1242, nel Champagne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogneが1192年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Hugues III de Bourgogneは44歳，母Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennoisは30歳であった。約1215年にヨーロッパでAmadeus IV Count of Savoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年3月26日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンチャンプアグンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne(이)가 1192년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues III de Bourgogne(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 우럽에서 Amadeus IV Count of Savoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 3월 26일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 챔파그니에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Bourgogne nasceu em 1192, em Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Hugues III de Bourgogne, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Amadeus IV Count of Savoy aproximadamente 1215, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de março de 1242, em Champagne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Bourgogne родилась в 1192 г. в местности бургогн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues III de Bourgogne было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amadeus IV Count of Savoy около 1215 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 марта 1242 г. в местности чампагн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Bourgogne nació en 1192, en Bourgogne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Hugues III de Bourgogne, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Béatrice d'Albon dauphine de Viennois, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Amadeus IV Count of Savoy aproximadamente 1215, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1242, en Champagne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
